privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic appointment scheduling task for the Bahmni healthcare information system. The task requires creating an appointment block for provider Superman on 2026-03-12 from 09:00 to 13:00 at the Registration Desk location. All target values are hardcoded in the setup and verification scripts and are consistent with the task description. Superman is a fictional test provider name; the date 2026-03-12 is a future demo date; and Registration Desk is a standard location type in Bahmni systems. The verifier performs exact string matching on all appointment block details including times in HH:MM:SS format.
